sellers_note: The 2013 Ford F-150 King Ranch 4x4 is what happens when rugged Texas toughness decides it deserves a leather-appointed throne. Under the hood, the proven 3.5L EcoBoost® V6 delivers a spirited 365 horsepower and 420 lb-ft of torque, paired with a capable 6-speed automatic transmission and dependable 4-wheel drive for confidence on the highway, job site, or backcountry trail. Dressed in distinctive King Ranch styling, this F-150 features premium Chaparral leather seating, heated and cooled front seats, dual-zone automatic climate control, navigation, premium audio, power-adjustable pedals, and a spacious SuperCrew cabin built for both work and relaxation. With impressive towing capability, a durable bed ready for real-world tasks, and enough luxury touches to make long drives feel like a reward instead of a chore, this King Ranch proves you don't have to choose between a hardworking pickup and a comfortable daily driver. It's equal parts cowboy boot and business suitready to haul the trailer during the day and arrive at dinner looking like it owns the ranch by night. What You Need To Know!!
